info.value:
M: Hi, Amy. It was Earth Day last Friday. Where did your class go?

W: Hi, Tom. We went to Zhongshan Park.

M: Oh, really? What did you do there?

W: We cleaned the streets and collected the rubbish. What about you?

M: Our class went to the community centre. We learnt how to recycle the waste and did some arts and crafts.

W: Wow! Sounds interesting.
